records.m_Talk_ENG: There's a private aerospace facility that I've been supporting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's a private aerospace facility that I've been supporting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's a private aerospace facility that I've been supporting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A private aerospace facility?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A private aerospace facility?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A private aerospace facility?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Correct.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Correct.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Correct.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You see, the Administration's aerospace control facility is currently down due to the enemy's attack.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You see, the Administration's aerospace control facility is currently down due to the enemy's attack.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You see, the Administration's aerospace control facility is currently down due to the enemy's attack.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Consider it a combination of insurance and investment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Consider it a combination of insurance and investment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Consider it a combination of insurance and investment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now that I think of it...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now that I think of it...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now that I think of it...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, the Moderator's target was also a control facility.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, the Moderator's target was also a control facility.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, the Moderator's target was also a control facility.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did it predict that this would happen...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did it predict that this would happen...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did it predict that this would happen...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? What's wrong? Is there something on my face?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? What's wrong? Is there something on my face?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? What's wrong? Is there something on my face?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I guess...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I guess...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I guess...

records.m_Talk_ENG: you weren't lying when you said you were the Supreme Administrator.
records.m_Talk_DEU: you weren't lying when you said you were the Supreme Administrator.
records.m_Talk_FRA: you weren't lying when you said you were the Supreme Administrator.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, why would I lie about that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, why would I lie about that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, why would I lie about that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I heard rumors about someone in charge of the Administration behind Hive Control,
records.m_Talk_DEU: I heard rumors about someone in charge of the Administration behind Hive Control,
records.m_Talk_FRA: I heard rumors about someone in charge of the Administration behind Hive Control,

records.m_Talk_ENG: but that person turns out to be even more shameless than I expected!
records.m_Talk_DEU: but that person turns out to be even more shameless than I expected!
records.m_Talk_FRA: but that person turns out to be even more shameless than I expected!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, I get that a lot.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, I get that a lot.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, I get that a lot.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, I have loads of questions I want to ask, but that's not what's important right now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, I have loads of questions I want to ask, but that's not what's important right now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, I have loads of questions I want to ask, but that's not what's important right now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right, I don't care who you are as long as I can save everyone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right, I don't care who you are as long as I can save everyone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right, I don't care who you are as long as I can save everyone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As the head of Yaksha, I'm willing to cooperate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As the head of Yaksha, I'm willing to cooperate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As the head of Yaksha, I'm willing to cooperate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for understanding.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for understanding.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for understanding.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So? What should I do?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So? What should I do?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So? What should I do?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's this...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's this...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's this...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is the reentry capsule module that you'll be riding in. It's based on the Soyuz spacecraft with some modifications.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is the reentry capsule module that you'll be riding in. It's based on the Soyuz spacecraft with some modifications.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is the reentry capsule module that you'll be riding in. It's based on the Soyuz spacecraft with some modifications.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I bought the launch vehicle that was supposed to launch into space today and delayed it by two hours.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I bought the launch vehicle that was supposed to launch into space today and delayed it by two hours.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I bought the launch vehicle that was supposed to launch into space today and delayed it by two hours.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right now, I'm connecting the lines to enable communication with the Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right now, I'm connecting the lines to enable communication with the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right now, I'm connecting the lines to enable communication with the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? You bought it today?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? You bought it today?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? You bought it today?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's for the operation. The launch will go as planned today.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's for the operation. The launch will go as planned today.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's for the operation. The launch will go as planned today.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But officially, today's test will be reported as a failure.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But officially, today's test will be reported as a failure.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But officially, today's test will be reported as a failure.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because as soon as it breaks through the atmosphere, it'll be detected by the enemy and explode.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because as soon as it breaks through the atmosphere, it'll be detected by the enemy and explode.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because as soon as it breaks through the atmosphere, it'll be detected by the enemy and explode.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For about a week, people will discuss how it was a waste of taxpayer money and what caused the explosion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For about a week, people will discuss how it was a waste of taxpayer money and what caused the explosion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For about a week, people will discuss how it was a waste of taxpayer money and what caused the explosion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But after the dust settles, no one will remember a failed unmanned spacecraft.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But after the dust settles, no one will remember a failed unmanned spacecraft.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But after the dust settles, no one will remember a failed unmanned spacecraft.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow, that really is the way of the Administration to look at things.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wow, that really is the way of the Administration to look at things.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow, that really is the way of the Administration to look at things.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So? What about unofficially? What do I have to do?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So? What about unofficially? What do I have to do?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So? What about unofficially? What do I have to do?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The signal of the data-corrupted Administration strategic satellite is caught at a low altitude of 400 km.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The signal of the data-corrupted Administration strategic satellite is caught at a low altitude of 400 km.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The signal of the data-corrupted Administration strategic satellite is caught at a low altitude of 400 km.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You will ride this shuttle all the way up there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You will ride this shuttle all the way up there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You will ride this shuttle all the way up there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, you'll use your space jump ability to destroy its power source as soon as you identify the enemy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, you'll use your space jump ability to destroy its power source as soon as you identify the enemy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, you'll use your space jump ability to destroy its power source as soon as you identify the enemy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Once the reactor has been eliminated, the coalition divisions will immediately dive to Philharmonic Hall.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Once the reactor has been eliminated, the coalition divisions will immediately dive to Philharmonic Hall.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Once the reactor has been eliminated, the coalition divisions will immediately dive to Philharmonic Hall.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Meanwhile, the Administration will send a space shuttle to rescue you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Meanwhile, the Administration will send a space shuttle to rescue you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Meanwhile, the Administration will send a space shuttle to rescue you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That sounds like a very complicated operation. Are you sure this will work?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That sounds like a very complicated operation. Are you sure this will work?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That sounds like a very complicated operation. Are you sure this will work?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The operation relies heavily on your space jump ability.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The operation relies heavily on your space jump ability.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The operation relies heavily on your space jump ability.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your ability in outer space is special. This will never work with anyone else.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your ability in outer space is special. This will never work with anyone else.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your ability in outer space is special. This will never work with anyone else.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Uh, okay...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Uh, okay...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Uh, okay...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, I'll make sure to do it in one go.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, I'll make sure to do it in one go.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, I'll make sure to do it in one go.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because I'm not going to allow anyone to die on my watch anymore.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because I'm not going to allow anyone to die on my watch anymore.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because I'm not going to allow anyone to die on my watch anymore.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Commander Alice, I want to ask you something.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Commander Alice, I want to ask you something.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Commander Alice, I want to ask you something.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aren't you scared?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aren't you scared?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aren't you scared?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Countless lives are in your hands in this operation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Countless lives are in your hands in this operation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Countless lives are in your hands in this operation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Possibly more than you can even imagine.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Possibly more than you can even imagine.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Possibly more than you can even imagine.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, I'd be lying if I said I wasn't.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, I'd be lying if I said I wasn't.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, I'd be lying if I said I wasn't.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I was also always scared of going into fires when I was a firefighter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I was also always scared of going into fires when I was a firefighter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I was also always scared of going into fires when I was a firefighter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All I want is for no one to die on my watch.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All I want is for no one to die on my watch.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All I want is for no one to die on my watch.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the people in danger right now are those I would never replace for anything in the world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the people in danger right now are those I would never replace for anything in the world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the people in danger right now are those I would never replace for anything in the world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All the hardships, joys, and sorrow... I experienced it all while being next to them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All the hardships, joys, and sorrow... I experienced it all while being next to them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All the hardships, joys, and sorrow... I experienced it all while being next to them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So this isn't about some grandiose plan of saving the world, or acting according to the Administration's plans.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So this isn't about some grandiose plan of saving the world, or acting according to the Administration's plans.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So this isn't about some grandiose plan of saving the world, or acting according to the Administration's plans.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm doing this on my own accord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm doing this on my own accord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm doing this on my own accord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So that I can save my precious division members and myself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So that I can save my precious division members and myself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So that I can save my precious division members and myself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't really like it, but I'll say thank you for now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't really like it, but I'll say thank you for now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't really like it, but I'll say thank you for now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, thanks, Supreme Administrator.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, thanks, Supreme Administrator.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, thanks, Supreme Administrator.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For this opportunity to save my comrades.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For this opportunity to save my comrades.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For this opportunity to save my comrades.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Very well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Very well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Very well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, I'll be waiting, Commander Alice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, I'll be waiting, Commander Alice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, I'll be waiting, Commander Alice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit! Well, it'll be too late to save them if you keep on nitpicking like that!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit! Well, it'll be too late to save them if you keep on nitpicking like that!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit! Well, it'll be too late to save them if you keep on nitpicking like that!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then is there another way to dive to Philharmonic Hall within an hour?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then is there another way to dive to Philharmonic Hall within an hour?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then is there another way to dive to Philharmonic Hall within an hour?!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
That
8ks...!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
That
8ks...!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
That
8ks...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Send me up, Commander Hilde!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Send me up, Commander Hilde!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Send me up, Commander Hilde!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I promise... to throw that hunk of junk down to the ground!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I promise... to throw that hunk of junk down to the ground!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I promise... to throw that hunk of junk down to the ground!

records.m_Talk_ENG: In return, promise me this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In return, promise me this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In return, promise me this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You have to... rescue my division members trapped in Philharmonic Hall.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You have to... rescue my division members trapped in Philharmonic Hall.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You have to... rescue my division members trapped in Philharmonic Hall.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Understood. I give you my word.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Understood. I give you my word.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Understood. I give you my word.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, I hope for your safe return, Commander Alice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, I hope for your safe return, Commander Alice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, I hope for your safe return, Commander Alice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll complete my mission and return safe and sound.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll complete my mission and return safe and sound.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll complete my mission and return safe and sound.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh*

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I take that ship down, then the Fenrir Division will rescue my members no matter what.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I take that ship down, then the Fenrir Division will rescue my members no matter what.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I take that ship down, then the Fenrir Division will rescue my members no matter what.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I trust them. Because the Fenrir Division is invincible!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I trust them. Because the Fenrir Division is invincible!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I trust them. Because the Fenrir Division is invincible!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I must succeed. And open the way for the Fenrir Division.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I must succeed. And open the way for the Fenrir Division.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I must succeed. And open the way for the Fenrir Division.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So that I won't have any regrets...
records.m_Talk_DEU: So that I won't have any regrets...
records.m_Talk_FRA: So that I won't have any regrets...

records.m_Talk_ENG: This time... I'll save them all and greet them all with a smile.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This time... I'll save them all and greet them all with a smile.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This time... I'll save them all and greet them all with a smile.

records.m_Talk_ENG: COMMANDER!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: COMMANDER!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: COMMANDER!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Justine...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Justine...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Justine...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank goodness! I wasn't late! Right on time!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank goodness! I wasn't late! Right on time!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank goodness! I wasn't late! Right on time!

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what's going on? Aren't you supposed to stay at the base?
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what's going on? Aren't you supposed to stay at the base?
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what's going on? Aren't you supposed to stay at the base?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I came to give you this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I came to give you this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I came to give you this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Could you turn around for me? I'll install it on your suit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Could you turn around for me? I'll install it on your suit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Could you turn around for me? I'll install it on your suit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've been thinking.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've been thinking.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've been thinking.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Beast Claw will always be Commander Lionel's Unique Gear.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Beast Claw will always be Commander Lionel's Unique Gear.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Beast Claw will always be Commander Lionel's Unique Gear.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So you need equipment that can synergize with your ability, Commander Alice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So you need equipment that can synergize with your ability, Commander Alice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So you need equipment that can synergize with your ability, Commander Alice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The enemy's power engine we've been tracking...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The enemy's power engine we've been tracking...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The enemy's power engine we've been tracking...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I reverse-engineered and miniaturized Avesta Drive to create this, <color=#ffd34c>Astra Drive</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I reverse-engineered and miniaturized Avesta Drive to create this, <color=#ffd34c>Astra Drive</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I reverse-engineered and miniaturized Avesta Drive to create this, <color=#ffd34c>Astra Drive</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With this enabled, you'll be able to accelerate even faster as it'll resonate with your jumping ability!
records.m_Talk_DEU: With this enabled, you'll be able to accelerate even faster as it'll resonate with your jumping ability!
records.m_Talk_FRA: With this enabled, you'll be able to accelerate even faster as it'll resonate with your jumping ability!

records.m_Talk_ENG: In theory, it could allow you to enter and exit the atmosphere entirely on your own.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In theory, it could allow you to enter and exit the atmosphere entirely on your own.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In theory, it could allow you to enter and exit the atmosphere entirely on your own.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Really?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Really?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Really?

records.m_Talk_ENG: So I can run faster now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So I can run faster now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So I can run faster now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...But be careful.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...But be careful.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...But be careful.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Avesta Drive was made to absorb surrounding Corruption rays as its power source...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Avesta Drive was made to absorb surrounding Corruption rays as its power source...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Avesta Drive was made to absorb surrounding Corruption rays as its power source...

records.m_Talk_ENG: So it was originally designed to be mounted on machines with strong resistance to Corruption.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So it was originally designed to be mounted on machines with strong resistance to Corruption.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So it was originally designed to be mounted on machines with strong resistance to Corruption.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Astra Drive uses the same principle, and it might be unsuitable for human use.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Astra Drive uses the same principle, and it might be unsuitable for human use.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Astra Drive uses the same principle, and it might be unsuitable for human use.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if your Corruption resistance is strong, one or two uses would be the limit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if your Corruption resistance is strong, one or two uses would be the limit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if your Corruption resistance is strong, one or two uses would be the limit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Remember that! Only use it twice!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Remember that! Only use it twice!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Remember that! Only use it twice!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Okay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Okay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Okay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll keep that in mind. Thanks, Justine.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll keep that in mind. Thanks, Justine.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll keep that in mind. Thanks, Justine.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...*Sniffle*
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...*Sniffle*
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...*Sniffle*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh, I'm so mad.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh, I'm so mad.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh, I'm so mad.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Justine...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Justine...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Justine...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've never felt this angry...!! In my life before...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've never felt this angry...!! In my life before...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've never felt this angry...!! In my life before...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I only had a bit more time and money!! If I was a bit more talented...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I only had a bit more time and money!! If I was a bit more talented...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I only had a bit more time and money!! If I was a bit more talented...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then I wouldn't have to give you a piece of such unstable, dangerous equipment in the first place!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then I wouldn't have to give you a piece of such unstable, dangerous equipment in the first place!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then I wouldn't have to give you a piece of such unstable, dangerous equipment in the first place!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sniffle* But...! But...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sniffle* But...! But...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sniffle* But...! But...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: As much as I hate to admit it, this is the best I can do for now!
records.m_Talk_DEU: As much as I hate to admit it, this is the best I can do for now!
records.m_Talk_FRA: As much as I hate to admit it, this is the best I can do for now!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know that I can't stop you...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know that I can't stop you...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know that I can't stop you...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: So come back after a successful mission! Commander Alice!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: So come back after a successful mission! Commander Alice!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: So come back after a successful mission! Commander Alice!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Save Deputy Commander...! And everyone else too...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Save Deputy Commander...! And everyone else too...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Save Deputy Commander...! And everyone else too...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll be here waiting for all of you!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll be here waiting for all of you!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll be here waiting for all of you!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is the best gift, kid.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is the best gift, kid.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is the best gift, kid.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The most brilliant engineer I know made it. I'm certain that it'll come in handy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The most brilliant engineer I know made it. I'm certain that it'll come in handy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The most brilliant engineer I know made it. I'm certain that it'll come in handy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll prove its performance by successfully completing this operation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll prove its performance by successfully completing this operation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll prove its performance by successfully completing this operation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm currently in front of the space center.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm currently in front of the space center.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm currently in front of the space center.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The two-hour-delayed GAP-13 shuttle is finally ready to be launched into space.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The two-hour-delayed GAP-13 shuttle is finally ready to be launched into space.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The two-hour-delayed GAP-13 shuttle is finally ready to be launched into space.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The 10-second countdown will start now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The 10-second countdown will start now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The 10-second countdown will start now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ignition!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ignition!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ignition!

records.m_Talk_ENG: GAP-13 is soaring through the sky with red flames shooting from behind!
records.m_Talk_DEU: GAP-13 is soaring through the sky with red flames shooting from behind!
records.m_Talk_FRA: GAP-13 is soaring through the sky with red flames shooting from behind!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We have lift off!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We have lift off!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We have lift off!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You seem to make the same choices every time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You seem to make the same choices every time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You seem to make the same choices every time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You never hesitate in going into the fire to save others.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You never hesitate in going into the fire to save others.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You never hesitate in going into the fire to save others.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You said that you're not interested in grandiose plans, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You said that you're not interested in grandiose plans, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You said that you're not interested in grandiose plans, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But your dedication and sacrifice... will eventually save the world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But your dedication and sacrifice... will eventually save the world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But your dedication and sacrifice... will eventually save the world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, I'll make it so that you do.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, I'll make it so that you do.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, I'll make it so that you do.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So this time...
records.m_Talk_DEU: So this time...
records.m_Talk_FRA: So this time...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I wish you success, Alice Braidwood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I wish you success, Alice Braidwood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I wish you success, Alice Braidwood.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's a private aerospace facility that I've been supporting.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's a private aerospace facility that I've been supporting.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's a private aerospace facility that I've been supporting.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A private aerospace facility?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A private aerospace facility?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A private aerospace facility?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Correct.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Correct.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Correct.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You see, the Administration's aerospace control facility is currently down due to the enemy's attack.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You see, the Administration's aerospace control facility is currently down due to the enemy's attack.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You see, the Administration's aerospace control facility is currently down due to the enemy's attack.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Consider it a combination of insurance and investment.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Consider it a combination of insurance and investment.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Consider it a combination of insurance and investment.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now that I think of it...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now that I think of it...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now that I think of it...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, the Moderator's target was also a control facility.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, the Moderator's target was also a control facility.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, the Moderator's target was also a control facility.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did it predict that this would happen...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did it predict that this would happen...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did it predict that this would happen...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? What's wrong? Is there something on my face?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? What's wrong? Is there something on my face?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? What's wrong? Is there something on my face?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I guess...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I guess...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I guess...

root.m_Talk_ENG: you weren't lying when you said you were the Supreme Administrator.
root.m_Talk_DEU: you weren't lying when you said you were the Supreme Administrator.
root.m_Talk_FRA: you weren't lying when you said you were the Supreme Administrator.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, why would I lie about that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, why would I lie about that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, why would I lie about that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I heard rumors about someone in charge of the Administration behind Hive Control,
root.m_Talk_DEU: I heard rumors about someone in charge of the Administration behind Hive Control,
root.m_Talk_FRA: I heard rumors about someone in charge of the Administration behind Hive Control,

root.m_Talk_ENG: but that person turns out to be even more shameless than I expected!
root.m_Talk_DEU: but that person turns out to be even more shameless than I expected!
root.m_Talk_FRA: but that person turns out to be even more shameless than I expected!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, I get that a lot.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, I get that a lot.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, I get that a lot.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, I have loads of questions I want to ask, but that's not what's important right now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, I have loads of questions I want to ask, but that's not what's important right now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, I have loads of questions I want to ask, but that's not what's important right now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All right, I don't care who you are as long as I can save everyone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All right, I don't care who you are as long as I can save everyone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All right, I don't care who you are as long as I can save everyone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As the head of Yaksha, I'm willing to cooperate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As the head of Yaksha, I'm willing to cooperate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As the head of Yaksha, I'm willing to cooperate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for understanding.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for understanding.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for understanding.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So? What should I do?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So? What should I do?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So? What should I do?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What's this...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What's this...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What's this...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is the reentry capsule module that you'll be riding in. It's based on the Soyuz spacecraft with some modifications.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is the reentry capsule module that you'll be riding in. It's based on the Soyuz spacecraft with some modifications.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is the reentry capsule module that you'll be riding in. It's based on the Soyuz spacecraft with some modifications.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I bought the launch vehicle that was supposed to launch into space today and delayed it by two hours.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I bought the launch vehicle that was supposed to launch into space today and delayed it by two hours.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I bought the launch vehicle that was supposed to launch into space today and delayed it by two hours.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Right now, I'm connecting the lines to enable communication with the Administration.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Right now, I'm connecting the lines to enable communication with the Administration.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Right now, I'm connecting the lines to enable communication with the Administration.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What? You bought it today?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What? You bought it today?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What? You bought it today?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's for the operation. The launch will go as planned today.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's for the operation. The launch will go as planned today.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's for the operation. The launch will go as planned today.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But officially, today's test will be reported as a failure.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But officially, today's test will be reported as a failure.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But officially, today's test will be reported as a failure.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because as soon as it breaks through the atmosphere, it'll be detected by the enemy and explode.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because as soon as it breaks through the atmosphere, it'll be detected by the enemy and explode.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because as soon as it breaks through the atmosphere, it'll be detected by the enemy and explode.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For about a week, people will discuss how it was a waste of taxpayer money and what caused the explosion.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For about a week, people will discuss how it was a waste of taxpayer money and what caused the explosion.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For about a week, people will discuss how it was a waste of taxpayer money and what caused the explosion.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But after the dust settles, no one will remember a failed unmanned spacecraft.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But after the dust settles, no one will remember a failed unmanned spacecraft.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But after the dust settles, no one will remember a failed unmanned spacecraft.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wow, that really is the way of the Administration to look at things.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wow, that really is the way of the Administration to look at things.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wow, that really is the way of the Administration to look at things.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So? What about unofficially? What do I have to do?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So? What about unofficially? What do I have to do?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So? What about unofficially? What do I have to do?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The signal of the data-corrupted Administration strategic satellite is caught at a low altitude of 400 km.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The signal of the data-corrupted Administration strategic satellite is caught at a low altitude of 400 km.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The signal of the data-corrupted Administration strategic satellite is caught at a low altitude of 400 km.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You will ride this shuttle all the way up there.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You will ride this shuttle all the way up there.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You will ride this shuttle all the way up there.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, you'll use your space jump ability to destroy its power source as soon as you identify the enemy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, you'll use your space jump ability to destroy its power source as soon as you identify the enemy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, you'll use your space jump ability to destroy its power source as soon as you identify the enemy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Once the reactor has been eliminated, the coalition divisions will immediately dive to Philharmonic Hall.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Once the reactor has been eliminated, the coalition divisions will immediately dive to Philharmonic Hall.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Once the reactor has been eliminated, the coalition divisions will immediately dive to Philharmonic Hall.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Meanwhile, the Administration will send a space shuttle to rescue you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Meanwhile, the Administration will send a space shuttle to rescue you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Meanwhile, the Administration will send a space shuttle to rescue you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That sounds like a very complicated operation. Are you sure this will work?
root.m_Talk_DEU: That sounds like a very complicated operation. Are you sure this will work?
root.m_Talk_FRA: That sounds like a very complicated operation. Are you sure this will work?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The operation relies heavily on your space jump ability.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The operation relies heavily on your space jump ability.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The operation relies heavily on your space jump ability.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Your ability in outer space is special. This will never work with anyone else.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Your ability in outer space is special. This will never work with anyone else.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Your ability in outer space is special. This will never work with anyone else.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Uh, okay...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Uh, okay...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Uh, okay...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, I'll make sure to do it in one go.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, I'll make sure to do it in one go.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, I'll make sure to do it in one go.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because I'm not going to allow anyone to die on my watch anymore.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because I'm not going to allow anyone to die on my watch anymore.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because I'm not going to allow anyone to die on my watch anymore.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Commander Alice, I want to ask you something.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Commander Alice, I want to ask you something.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Commander Alice, I want to ask you something.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aren't you scared?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aren't you scared?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aren't you scared?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Countless lives are in your hands in this operation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Countless lives are in your hands in this operation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Countless lives are in your hands in this operation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Possibly more than you can even imagine.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Possibly more than you can even imagine.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Possibly more than you can even imagine.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, I'd be lying if I said I wasn't.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, I'd be lying if I said I wasn't.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, I'd be lying if I said I wasn't.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I was also always scared of going into fires when I was a firefighter.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I was also always scared of going into fires when I was a firefighter.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I was also always scared of going into fires when I was a firefighter.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All I want is for no one to die on my watch.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All I want is for no one to die on my watch.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All I want is for no one to die on my watch.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And the people in danger right now are those I would never replace for anything in the world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And the people in danger right now are those I would never replace for anything in the world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And the people in danger right now are those I would never replace for anything in the world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All the hardships, joys, and sorrow... I experienced it all while being next to them.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All the hardships, joys, and sorrow... I experienced it all while being next to them.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All the hardships, joys, and sorrow... I experienced it all while being next to them.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So this isn't about some grandiose plan of saving the world, or acting according to the Administration's plans.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So this isn't about some grandiose plan of saving the world, or acting according to the Administration's plans.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So this isn't about some grandiose plan of saving the world, or acting according to the Administration's plans.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm doing this on my own accord.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm doing this on my own accord.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm doing this on my own accord.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So that I can save my precious division members and myself.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So that I can save my precious division members and myself.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So that I can save my precious division members and myself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't really like it, but I'll say thank you for now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't really like it, but I'll say thank you for now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't really like it, but I'll say thank you for now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, thanks, Supreme Administrator.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, thanks, Supreme Administrator.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, thanks, Supreme Administrator.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For this opportunity to save my comrades.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For this opportunity to save my comrades.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For this opportunity to save my comrades.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Very well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Very well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Very well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, I'll be waiting, Commander Alice.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, I'll be waiting, Commander Alice.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, I'll be waiting, Commander Alice.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit! Well, it'll be too late to save them if you keep on nitpicking like that!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit! Well, it'll be too late to save them if you keep on nitpicking like that!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit! Well, it'll be too late to save them if you keep on nitpicking like that!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then is there another way to dive to Philharmonic Hall within an hour?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then is there another way to dive to Philharmonic Hall within an hour?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then is there another way to dive to Philharmonic Hall within an hour?!

root.m_Talk_ENG:
That
8ks...!
root.m_Talk_DEU:
That
8ks...!
root.m_Talk_FRA:
That
8ks...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Send me up, Commander Hilde!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Send me up, Commander Hilde!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Send me up, Commander Hilde!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I promise... to throw that hunk of junk down to the ground!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I promise... to throw that hunk of junk down to the ground!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I promise... to throw that hunk of junk down to the ground!

root.m_Talk_ENG: In return, promise me this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In return, promise me this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In return, promise me this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You have to... rescue my division members trapped in Philharmonic Hall.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You have to... rescue my division members trapped in Philharmonic Hall.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You have to... rescue my division members trapped in Philharmonic Hall.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Understood. I give you my word.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Understood. I give you my word.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Understood. I give you my word.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, I hope for your safe return, Commander Alice.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, I hope for your safe return, Commander Alice.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, I hope for your safe return, Commander Alice.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll complete my mission and return safe and sound.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll complete my mission and return safe and sound.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll complete my mission and return safe and sound.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh*

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I take that ship down, then the Fenrir Division will rescue my members no matter what.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I take that ship down, then the Fenrir Division will rescue my members no matter what.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I take that ship down, then the Fenrir Division will rescue my members no matter what.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I trust them. Because the Fenrir Division is invincible!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I trust them. Because the Fenrir Division is invincible!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I trust them. Because the Fenrir Division is invincible!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I must succeed. And open the way for the Fenrir Division.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I must succeed. And open the way for the Fenrir Division.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I must succeed. And open the way for the Fenrir Division.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So that I won't have any regrets...
root.m_Talk_DEU: So that I won't have any regrets...
root.m_Talk_FRA: So that I won't have any regrets...

root.m_Talk_ENG: This time... I'll save them all and greet them all with a smile.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This time... I'll save them all and greet them all with a smile.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This time... I'll save them all and greet them all with a smile.

root.m_Talk_ENG: COMMANDER!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: COMMANDER!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: COMMANDER!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Justine...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Justine...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Justine...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff*

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank goodness! I wasn't late! Right on time!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank goodness! I wasn't late! Right on time!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank goodness! I wasn't late! Right on time!

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-what's going on? Aren't you supposed to stay at the base?
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-what's going on? Aren't you supposed to stay at the base?
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-what's going on? Aren't you supposed to stay at the base?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I came to give you this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I came to give you this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I came to give you this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Could you turn around for me? I'll install it on your suit.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Could you turn around for me? I'll install it on your suit.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Could you turn around for me? I'll install it on your suit.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is...
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is...
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've been thinking.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've been thinking.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've been thinking.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Beast Claw will always be Commander Lionel's Unique Gear.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Beast Claw will always be Commander Lionel's Unique Gear.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Beast Claw will always be Commander Lionel's Unique Gear.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So you need equipment that can synergize with your ability, Commander Alice.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So you need equipment that can synergize with your ability, Commander Alice.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So you need equipment that can synergize with your ability, Commander Alice.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The enemy's power engine we've been tracking...
root.m_Talk_DEU: The enemy's power engine we've been tracking...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The enemy's power engine we've been tracking...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I reverse-engineered and miniaturized Avesta Drive to create this, <color=#ffd34c>Astra Drive</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I reverse-engineered and miniaturized Avesta Drive to create this, <color=#ffd34c>Astra Drive</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I reverse-engineered and miniaturized Avesta Drive to create this, <color=#ffd34c>Astra Drive</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: With this enabled, you'll be able to accelerate even faster as it'll resonate with your jumping ability!
root.m_Talk_DEU: With this enabled, you'll be able to accelerate even faster as it'll resonate with your jumping ability!
root.m_Talk_FRA: With this enabled, you'll be able to accelerate even faster as it'll resonate with your jumping ability!

root.m_Talk_ENG: In theory, it could allow you to enter and exit the atmosphere entirely on your own.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In theory, it could allow you to enter and exit the atmosphere entirely on your own.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In theory, it could allow you to enter and exit the atmosphere entirely on your own.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Really?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Really?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Really?

root.m_Talk_ENG: So I can run faster now?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So I can run faster now?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So I can run faster now?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...But be careful.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...But be careful.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...But be careful.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Avesta Drive was made to absorb surrounding Corruption rays as its power source...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Avesta Drive was made to absorb surrounding Corruption rays as its power source...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Avesta Drive was made to absorb surrounding Corruption rays as its power source...

root.m_Talk_ENG: So it was originally designed to be mounted on machines with strong resistance to Corruption.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So it was originally designed to be mounted on machines with strong resistance to Corruption.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So it was originally designed to be mounted on machines with strong resistance to Corruption.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Astra Drive uses the same principle, and it might be unsuitable for human use.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Astra Drive uses the same principle, and it might be unsuitable for human use.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Astra Drive uses the same principle, and it might be unsuitable for human use.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if your Corruption resistance is strong, one or two uses would be the limit.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if your Corruption resistance is strong, one or two uses would be the limit.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if your Corruption resistance is strong, one or two uses would be the limit.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Remember that! Only use it twice!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Remember that! Only use it twice!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Remember that! Only use it twice!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Okay.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Okay.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Okay.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll keep that in mind. Thanks, Justine.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll keep that in mind. Thanks, Justine.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll keep that in mind. Thanks, Justine.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...*Sniffle*
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...*Sniffle*
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...*Sniffle*

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh, I'm so mad.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh, I'm so mad.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh, I'm so mad.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Justine...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Justine...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Justine...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've never felt this angry...!! In my life before...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've never felt this angry...!! In my life before...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've never felt this angry...!! In my life before...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I only had a bit more time and money!! If I was a bit more talented...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I only had a bit more time and money!! If I was a bit more talented...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I only had a bit more time and money!! If I was a bit more talented...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then I wouldn't have to give you a piece of such unstable, dangerous equipment in the first place!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then I wouldn't have to give you a piece of such unstable, dangerous equipment in the first place!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then I wouldn't have to give you a piece of such unstable, dangerous equipment in the first place!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sniffle* But...! But...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sniffle* But...! But...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sniffle* But...! But...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: As much as I hate to admit it, this is the best I can do for now!
root.m_Talk_DEU: As much as I hate to admit it, this is the best I can do for now!
root.m_Talk_FRA: As much as I hate to admit it, this is the best I can do for now!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I know that I can't stop you...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I know that I can't stop you...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I know that I can't stop you...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: So come back after a successful mission! Commander Alice!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: So come back after a successful mission! Commander Alice!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: So come back after a successful mission! Commander Alice!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Save Deputy Commander...! And everyone else too...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Save Deputy Commander...! And everyone else too...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Save Deputy Commander...! And everyone else too...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll be here waiting for all of you!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll be here waiting for all of you!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll be here waiting for all of you!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is the best gift, kid.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is the best gift, kid.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is the best gift, kid.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The most brilliant engineer I know made it. I'm certain that it'll come in handy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The most brilliant engineer I know made it. I'm certain that it'll come in handy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The most brilliant engineer I know made it. I'm certain that it'll come in handy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll prove its performance by successfully completing this operation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll prove its performance by successfully completing this operation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll prove its performance by successfully completing this operation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm currently in front of the space center.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm currently in front of the space center.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm currently in front of the space center.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The two-hour-delayed GAP-13 shuttle is finally ready to be launched into space.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The two-hour-delayed GAP-13 shuttle is finally ready to be launched into space.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The two-hour-delayed GAP-13 shuttle is finally ready to be launched into space.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The 10-second countdown will start now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The 10-second countdown will start now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The 10-second countdown will start now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ignition!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ignition!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ignition!

root.m_Talk_ENG: GAP-13 is soaring through the sky with red flames shooting from behind!
root.m_Talk_DEU: GAP-13 is soaring through the sky with red flames shooting from behind!
root.m_Talk_FRA: GAP-13 is soaring through the sky with red flames shooting from behind!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We have lift off!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We have lift off!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We have lift off!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You seem to make the same choices every time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You seem to make the same choices every time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You seem to make the same choices every time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You never hesitate in going into the fire to save others.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You never hesitate in going into the fire to save others.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You never hesitate in going into the fire to save others.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You said that you're not interested in grandiose plans, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You said that you're not interested in grandiose plans, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You said that you're not interested in grandiose plans, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: But your dedication and sacrifice... will eventually save the world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But your dedication and sacrifice... will eventually save the world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But your dedication and sacrifice... will eventually save the world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No, I'll make it so that you do.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No, I'll make it so that you do.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No, I'll make it so that you do.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So this time...
root.m_Talk_DEU: So this time...
root.m_Talk_FRA: So this time...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I wish you success, Alice Braidwood.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I wish you success, Alice Braidwood.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I wish you success, Alice Braidwood.
